title: Removal and installation of Honda Smart LF antenna (power mirror)

crossRefs.label: Remove the door mirror side turn signal lights (for vehicles equipped with door mirror side turn signal lights).

blocks.text: Removal and installation of Honda Smart LF antenna (power mirror)

The power mirror LF antenna is an integral part of the power mirror harness assembly and cannot be detached by itself. Therefore, when removing and installing the power mirror LF antenna, remove the power mirror harness assembly.
1. Power mirror removal
2. Mirror holder removal
3. Skull cap removal
4. Remove the door mirror side turn signal lights (for vehicles equipped with door mirror side turn signal lights).

refs.label: Remove the door mirror side turn signal lights (for vehicles equipped with door mirror side turn signal lights).

blocks.text: 5. Power mirror LF antenna removal
Record the wiring color and terminal arrangement of the coupler (A) and remove each terminal (B) from the coupler.
Remove the packing (A).
Remove the base (A). Remove the cover (B).
Remove the power mirror LF antenna (A) with the power mirror harness assembly (B).

The power mirror LF antenna is an integral part of the power mirror harness assembly and cannot be attached or detached by itself. Therefore, when removing and installing the power mirror LF antenna, install the power mirror harness assy.
1. Power Mirror LF Antenna Installation
Install the power mirror LF antenna (A) with the power mirror harness assembly (B).
Install the cover (A). Install the base (B).
Install the packing (A).
While checking the recorded wiring color and terminal arrangement, insert the unplugged harness terminals into the coupler.
2. Door mirror side turn signal light installation (for vehicles equipped with door mirror side turn signal lights)

refs.label: Door mirror side turn signal light installation (for vehicles equipped with door mirror side turn signal lights)

blocks.text: 3. Skull Cap Mounting
4. Mirror Holder Mounting
5. Power Mirror Installation
6. After installation Confirmation
After installation, verify that the power mirrors operate, the door mirror side turn signal lights and the Honda smart key system work properly.
